flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Presbyterian College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (54.2% → 42.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Presbyterian College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (61.5% → 51.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Presbyterian College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Presbyterian College are 44% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($60.2k vs $41.7k).
